## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and explore potential collaboration between Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) and James Winter (engine.com)](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's company (growthx.ai) has rapidly grown to \~$8M ARR, raised $12M, and built an AI-powered workflow system for marketing/growth services](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [The platform combines expert-guided AI agents, code-based workflows, and a learning layer to automate complex knowledge work](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [James is interested in potential use cases for engine.com (business travel platform) and his other portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's Company Journey

  - [Started as a side project building AI workflows for marketing/growth](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)
  - [Rapid growth: \~$1.5M ARR within months, $27K/mo contract with Ramps](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Scaled to \~$8M ARR, 60 employees, raised $12M Series A in 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Shifting from services to productized AI infrastructure and workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)

### Technical Infrastructure

  - [Built by ex-IFTTT head of engineering (Daniel, co-founder)](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [AI coding agent creates workflows in code](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Runtime layer, observability, and learning layer that improves with usage](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [31,000+ workflow runs, 445,000+ activities in recent month](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Business Model & Future Plans

  - [Currently focused on delivering high-value services (e.g., content, growth)](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Planning to open platform for self-serve use (similar to Cursor)](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Developing IDE for non-technical users to build/modify workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Exploring custom workflow creation for clients and potential API offerings](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)

### Use Cases & Applications

  - [Content creation, distribution, and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [Hiring process automation (resume parsing, candidate assessment)](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Deep research, fact-checking, style adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Custom workflows for account research, prospecting, transcript processing](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Pricing & Engagement Model

  - [Current pricing based on work streams/bundles (e.g., content + distribution)](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Typically start with marketing teams due to budget and need](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Full-service model: managing director, managing editor, hands-on team](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)

### Potential Collaboration with James/engine.com

  - [Explore content strategy for engine.com despite SEO challenges](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Discuss specific use cases for engine.com and James' portfolio companies](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Set up a 30-minute deep dive to assess potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)

## Next Steps

  - [James to reach out to Marcel's admin to schedule a 30-minute follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [Marcel to include Kyle (VP of Growth at first customer) in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
  - [James to send blog content and current keyword rankings for engine.com](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Explore potential partnership for upcoming AI-ledgrowth.com community](https://fathom.video/share/7iy_1EUtpiNEfo4rKnpZ7b-LnYvrrkms?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
